title: Block Subsidy
description: The block subsidy is the newly issued bitcoin a valid block may claim in its coinbase transaction. It follows the issuance schedule and declines through halvings, while transaction fees are a separate part of miner revenue.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Reference for mining rewards, coinbase transactions, and Bitcoin's issuance schedule.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Block Chain
resources.notes: Explains block validation and the coinbase reward.
